implementation_changes: strict_generator_mlx_specialist_routing now forwards enable_semantic_operation_value_construction into specialist route decode options
strict_generator_mlx_decode_plans now blocks bare builtin/type attribute receiver chains during expression-value decode
strict_generator_mlx_decode_plans now blocks uncalled attribute references from closing as runtime values while still allowing repair into calls
conclusion: Semantic-IR obligation training is now durable and clean, but strict replay remains behavior-zero. The remaining wall is semantic/value body construction and verifier-positive update/finalizer/return closure, not another malformed-token guard, sample-coverage fix, target-side weighting family, or DPO loss-only movement.
next_required_work: Implement a behavior-changing trainable AST/state-machine or localized semantic-IR body-construction path, then rerun strict private replay. Only after non-fallback learned candidates pass private verifier checks should bounded DPO/IPO/ORPO/KTO/SimPO or GRPO/RLVR be treated as capability levers.
